alkylation reagent: alkylated by addition of 2.7 µl of 0.55M iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: 20 µl of MS-Grade trypsin (Thermo Scientific) dissolved at 0.1 µg/µl concentration
collision energy: following higher energy collision dissociation (HCD) using a collision energy of 35
enrichment method: the channel complex affinity purified via the FLAG-epitope tag
instrument: Data-dependent tandem mass spectrometry analysis was performed using an Orbitrap Fusion instrument
reduction reagent: exposure to the reducing reagent dithiothreitol (DTT)
reduction concentration: current recovery upon exposure to DTT (10 mM)
